description: Router scans index.json and finds review-pool listed as idle. The metadata_dir path does not exist on disk — FR-MMT22 Condition 1 will trigger.
assertion: index.json lists review-pool as idle; metadata_dir_exists is false; discovery has started

description: FR-MMT22 Condition 1 fires: metadata_dir referenced in index.json does not exist on disk. Pool is flagged as stale.
assertion: detection_reason is metadata-missing; pool_name is review-pool; FR-MMT22 Condition 1 triggered

description: standing-pool-cleanup agent called to remove the stale entry. Index entry removed; metadata_dir removal skipped (dir does not exist).
assertion: cleanup result is removed; index entry removed; metadata_dir removal was skipped (false) because dir did not exist

description: User-visible warning emitted once. Session marker set to suppress duplicate warnings for this pool.

state.warning_text: Standing pool 'review-pool' was stale and has been cleaned up. Falling back to fresh-spawn review.

assertion: warning_shown is true; warning_text contains verbatim FR-MMT22 fragments
